name: Ensure ECS clusters use Container Insights
body:
### Overview

Cyscale fails this control when an ECS cluster does not have the `containerInsights` setting set to `enabled`. Container Insights provides cluster, service, and task metrics that help detect operational and security-impacting issues.

The next assessment will pass after the ECS cluster setting is enabled.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Enable Container Insights on the affected ECS cluster.

1. Open **Amazon ECS > Clusters**.
2. Select the affected cluster.
3. Open **Update cluster**.
4. Enable **Container Insights**.
5. Save the cluster configuration.

AWS CLI command:

```bash
aws ecs update-cluster-settings --cluster {{asset.name}} --settings name=containerInsights,value=enabled --region {{asset.region}}
```

Cyscale will pass when the cluster has an ECS setting with key `containerInsights` and value `enabled`.
description: Amazon ECS clusters that do not have Container Insights enabled.
